---
title: "#bioc2u"
format: gfm
---

## 2023-12-02

**Alex Mahmoud** (01:39:49):
> @Alex Mahmoud has joined the channel

**Vince Carey** (01:39:54):
> @Vince Carey has joined the channel

**Vince Carey** (07:06:07):
> @Benilton S Carvalhowelcome aboard bioc2u!

**Benilton S Carvalho** (07:06:10):
> @Benilton S Carvalho has joined the channel


## 2024-05-14

**Alex Mahmoud** (11:15:05):
> set the channel description: Discussing Bioc2u ([https://github.com/bioconductor/bioc2u](https://github.com/bioconductor/bioc2u)), i.e. Bioconductor packages delivered on ubuntu with system dependencies via apt

**Lori Shepherd** (12:44:10):
> archived the channel
